items.text: cell-phones, lap-tops, video-game consoles, smart watches, ....
household robots, driverless cars, smart watches, drones, ....

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: An outline of technology domains of interest: the IT stack, consumer electronics, and smart products.
extracted_json.summary_gist: This page lists three technology domains of interest. (a) The IT stack, broken into layers each with a representative vendor: Computer Networks (CISCO), Computer Architecture (Intel), Operating Systems (Microsoft), Databases (Oracle), and Application Software (Microsoft, SAP, IBM, etc.). (b) Consumer Electronics, with examples such as cell-phones, laptops, video-game consoles, and smart watches. (c) Smart products, including household robots, driverless cars, smart watches, and drones.

transcription:
3.    Technology Domains of interest

   (a) IT stack    - Computer Networks (CISCO)
                    - Computer Architecture (Intel)
                    - Operating Systems (Microsoft)
                    - Databases (Oracle)
                    - Application Software
                      (Microsoft, SAP, IBM,....)

   (b) Consumer Electronics
        cell-phones, lap-tops, video-game consoles,
        smart watches, ....

   (c) Smart products
        - household robots, driverless cars,
          smart watches, drones, ....
